data.title: DeFi revenues plunge in March as onchain activity slows
data.description:
MakerDAO (now known as Sky) was the only major DeFi protocol to post revenue growth, while DeFi tokens have struggled, with the GMDEFI index down 40% year-to-date.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/349471/defi-revenues-plunge-in-march-as-onchain-activity-slows?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Financial Firm Republic Plans To Acquire Crypto and Tokenized Securities Trading Platform INX for $60,000,000
data.description:
The global financial firm Republic is planning on purchasing a crypto and tokenized securities trading platform for tens of millions of dollars. According to a new press release, Republic – founded in 2016 and backed by banking giant Morgan Stanley – plans on purchasing real-world asset tokenization platform INX (INXDF) for up to $60 million.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/04/financial-firm-republic-plans-to-acquire-crypto-and-tokenized-securities-trading-platform-inx-for-60000000/

data.title: Countries abandoning USD stablecoins after Trump opened their eyes to crypto is the ultimate paradox
data.description:

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/countries-abandoning-usd-trump-paradox/

data.title: SEC lays out guidelines for stablecoins, excludes algorithmic tokens
data.description:
The United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) released a statement on April 4 establishing guidelines for stablecoins. In an April 4 statement, the agency minted a new term, "covered stablecoins," classifying them as non-securities and exempting such tokens’ transactions from reporting requirements. According to the SEC's definition, a "covered stablecoin" is fully backed by physical fiat reserves or short-term, low-risk, highly liquid instruments and is fully redeemable at a 1:1 ratio with US dollars. The definition precludes algorithmic stablecoins that maintain their US dollar peg using software or an automated trading strategy, leaving the regulatory status of algorithmic stablecoins, synthetic dollars, and yield-bearing fiat tokens uncertain
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/united-states-sec-covered-stablecoins-not-securities?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: XRP Finally Poised For Light at End Of Tunnel As On-Chain Activity Goes Through the Roof
data.description:
Despite the bearish momentum being experienced in the crypto market, XRP has remained steadfast above $2, thanks to strong on-chain metrics.
source: https://zycrypto.com/xrp-finally-poised-for-light-at-end-of-tunnel-as-on-chain-activity-goes-through-the-roof/

data.title: Bitcoin Boom Still In Play? Analyst Predicts Final Leg Up
data.description:
According to a CryptoQuant Quicktake post published earlier today, Bitcoin (BTC) may not have reached the peak of the current market cycle just yet. A key on-chain metric suggests that there could be one final leg up for the leading cryptocurrency before this bull market concludes. Bitcoin To Hit New Peak Soon? Data from CoinGecko shows that Bitcoin has dropped more than 23% since reaching its most recent all-time high (ATH) of $108,786, on January 8. The top digital asset has largely been affected by ongoing global macroeconomic uncertainties, particularly those related to US President Donald Trump’s new tariff policies
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-boom-still-in-play-analyst-predicts-final-leg-up/

data.title: Weekly Crypto Regulation News Roundup: Lawmakers Question if Trump Influences SEC, Fed’s CBDC Bill Blocked
data.description:
In this edition of the Weekly Crypto Regulation News, lawmakers press the SEC on Trump-linked crypto ties, the Fed faces CBDC hurdles, and bipartisan support boosts stablecoin legislation while the CFTC adjusts its crypto stance.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-regulation-news-roundup-political-pressure-grows/

data.title: Bitcoin holds firm while traditional markets bleed from Trump tariffs
data.description:
Markets plunged after President Trump announced global tariffs, triggering the worst stock performances since 2020 and a sharp crypto pullback.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/349697/bitcoin-holds-firm-while-traditional-markets-bleed-from-trump-tariffs?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
